member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.DevicePropertyMetaData
member.summary: A wrapper around that re-associates the property with the correct outer engine rather than the internal DeviceDetectionHashEngine. Can also create a synthetic property with explicit name, type, and item properties.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.DevicePropertyMetaData.#ctor(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IFlowElement,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IFiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaData)
member.summary: Creates a wrapper with a different associated engine.
member.param: The engine to associate with this property.
The original property metadata from the inner engine.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.DevicePropertyMetaData.#ctor(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IFlowElement,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IFiftyOneAspectPropertyMetaData},System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new synthetic property metadata with explicit name, type, and item properties.
member.param: The engine to associate with this property.
The property name (e.g. "Profiles").
Sub-properties of this property.
The CLR type of this property.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.DevicePropertyMetaData.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the object.
member.param: True if called from Dispose(), false if called from finalizer.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.DevicePropertyMetaData.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizer.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.IMultiDeviceData
member.summary: Extends for device data profiles. Stores profile IDs and resolves them to instances on demand.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.IMultiDeviceData.AddProfileId(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Adds a profile ID to be resolved when Profiles is accessed.
member.param: The profile ID to add.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.MultiDeviceData
member.summary: Implementation of that stores profile IDs and resolves them to instances on demand. Manages lifecycle of created flow data instances for proper disposal.
Constructs a new instance of .
member.param: Logger instance.
The pipeline this data belongs to.
The engine that created this data.
Service for handling missing properties.
The data set containing pipeline reference for profile resolution.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.MultiDeviceData.AddProfile(FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.IDeviceData)
member.summary: Adds a profile directly. Used internally during resolution.
member.param: The device data to add.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.MultiDeviceData.ResolveProfiles
member.summary: Resolves all stored profile IDs to IDeviceData instances.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Data.MultiDeviceData.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes all owned flow data instances.
member.param: True if called from Dispose().

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Extensions.GetDeviceDetectionHashEngine(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Returns the if present in the pipeline.
member.returns: The instance of from the pipeline.
member.exception: Thrown if there is no instance of available.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.NativeEngine.Validate(System.String,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData)
member.summary: Validates the NativeModel is at least the minimum number of characters.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceBaseEngine
member.summary: A generic device detection engine that uses property-keyed lookups against a . Can be configured to validate input and use any property as the key.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceBaseEngine.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constructs a new instance.
member.param: The factory used to create loggers.
The properties to be indexed.
The property name to use for lookups (e.g. "TAC", "NativeModel").
The unique key for this engine's data in flow data.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceBaseEngine.CreateElementData(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Creates the element data for each request.
member.param: The pipeline instance.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceBaseEngine.AddPipeline(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Called when pipeline is added. Attempts early initialization.
member.param: The pipeline being added.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceBaseEngine.EnsureDataSetInitialized(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Ensures that the DataSet is initialized. This is a fallback in case AddPipeline wasn't called.
member.param: The pipeline to query for the hash engine.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBaseBuilder`2
member.summary: Builder for . Supports configuring the key property and element data key.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBaseBuilder`2.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Services.IDataUpdateService)
member.summary: Constructs a new instance of .
member.param: The factory used to create loggers.
The data update service, if any.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBaseBuilder`2.SetKeyProperty(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the property name to use for lookups. This is required before building the engine.
member.remarks:
This is not the same as the returned properties for the engine which are set with
or
methods.
member.param: The property name (e.g. "TAC", "NativeModel").

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBaseBuilder`2.SetElementDataKey(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the unique key for this engine's data in flow data. If not set, defaults to "profiles-{keyProperty}".
member.param: The element data key.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBaseBuilder`2.SetConcurrency(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Sets the concurrency. Not supported for property keyed engines.
member.param: The concurrency value (ignored).

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBaseBuilder`2.Build
member.summary: Build the engine without a data file. PropertyKeyedDeviceEngine does not use a DataFile directly — it resolves its data from DeviceDetectionHashEngine via at runtime.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBuilder
member.summary: Builder for . Supports configuring the key property, validation, and element data key.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedDeviceEngineBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Services.IDataUpdateService)
member.summary: Constructs a new instance of .
member.param: The factory used to create loggers.
The data update service, if any.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.FlowElements.TacEngine.Validate(System.String,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData)
member.summary: Validates TAC format: must be exactly 8 numeric digits.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Messages
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Messages.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Messages.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Messages.ConcurrencyNotSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SetConcurrency is not supported for PropertyKeyedDeviceEngine. The engine uses DeviceDetectionHashEngine's configuration..

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Messages.IncorrectNativeEvidence
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The NativeModel must be at least two or more characters..

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Messages.IncorrectTacEvidence
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The TAC value '{0}' is not valid. A TAC must be exactly 8 numeric digits..

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Messages.PerformanceProfileNotSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SetPerformanceProfile is not supported for PropertyKeyedDeviceEngine. The engine uses DeviceDetectionHashEngine's configuration..

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.DataSetService
member.summary: Concrete implementation of the data set service used to create property value indexed data sets for flow element processing.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.DataSetService.#ctor(FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.IPropertyValueQueryService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.DataSetService})
member.summary: Constructs a new instance of .
member.param: Service used to get profile and device data from the .

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.DataSetService.ProcessProfile(System.ValueTuple{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.Data.IProfileMetaData,FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.IDeviceData},System.Collections.Generic.List{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.FiftyOne.FlowElements.PropertyKeyedIndex})
member.summary: Extracts any relevant values from the profile and adds when as keys for the profile.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.DataSetService.ConvertValues(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.IAspectPropertyValue)
member.summary: Converts the given IAspectPropertyValue to an enumeration of string values to be indexed.
member.param: The aspect property value.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.IDataSetService.BuildDataSet(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IFlowElement,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Builds the property value index from the pipeline provided.
member.param: The element that already exists in the pipeline that will consume the resulting data set.
The source pipeline that must contain a instance.
member.returns: A new instance of a data set populated with property values from the engine.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.IPropertyValueQueryService.IndexedProperties
member.summary: The properties in the to index.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.IPropertyValueQueryService.CreateContext(FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.Hash.Engine.OnPremise.FlowElements.DeviceDetectionHashEngine)
member.summary: Creates a pipeline that only contains the engine provided.
member.returns: A pipeline ready to be passed to .

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.IPropertyValueQueryService.Query(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Iterates over the profiles and associated data where the profile contains the properties the service is filtering for.
member.param: A pipeline created specifically for querying for profiles.
member.returns: All the relevant profiles and meta data.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.PropertyValueQueryService
member.summary: Concrete implementation of the data set service used to create property value indexed data sets for flow element processing.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.DeviceDetection.PropertyKeyed.Services.PropertyValueQueryService.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Constructs a new instance of .
member.param: The properties in the to index.
